final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: must show both front and back sides of the badge
Subject: must include "字节跳动" as the company name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must show front and back sides
